name: Provencal Ragout
recipeIngredient: 2 large Yellow squash, cut into 1-inch cubes
2 Red bell peppers, cut into large chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large roasting pan or casserole dish.
3. Place in oven and cook, uncovered, for about 4 hours, stirring every half hour.
4. Add more wine or vegetable stock if liquid evaporates too quickly.
5. Serve hot.
